summary: Completed backend API testing for V6 onboarding flow. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend preview URL unavailable due to Emergent platform inactivity timeout - not an app issue. Code review confirms correct implementation of UserDetailsScreen, profile endpoints, and onboarding flow.

platform_issues.issue: Preview URL (https://astroapp-oauth.preview.emergentagent.com) showing 'Preview Unavailable' due to Emergent platform inactivity timeout
platform_issues.impact: Cannot perform UI testing via browser automation
platform_issues.resolution: Platform needs to be woken up via app.emergent.sh

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Field mapping correct: birthDate→dob, birthTime→tob, birthPlace→location (lines 52-54)
✓ Backend UserProfileRequest model accepts gender field (auth/models.py line 57)
✓ Profile endpoint validates date/time format and returns 400 for invalid formats
✓ Onboarding flow in SimplifiedApp.jsx correctly sequences: UserDetails → HowNiroWorks → TrustSafety → Home
✓ HomeScreen has profile button with data-testid='profile-button' (line 343)
✓ UserDetailsScreen has data-testid='user-details-continue' on submit button (line 263)

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test - preview URL unavailable (platform issue)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use dynamic test data with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully tested and working. Profile endpoints (POST/GET /api/profile/) work correctly with JWT auth. Auth endpoint (POST /api/auth/identify) creates users and returns tokens. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation. Preview URL was unavailable during testing due to Emergent platform inactivity - may need to wake up the preview environment before UI testing.
